name: Gemju Sherpa
title: Software/AI/ML Engineer
about: I am a Software Developer and AI Engineer with a strong background in full-stack development, machine learning, and data science. I hold a Master of Information Technology and Systems (Research/Data Science) from the University of Tasmania and have industry experience building scalable web applications, geospatial solutions, and cloud-based systems. My work spans software engineering, deep learning, large language models (LLMs), multi-agent reinforcement learning, data analytics, and information propagation research, with publications and open-source contributions in AI. I enjoy solving complex problems by combining modern software engineering practices with intelligent systems, and I am passionate about building innovative, data-driven solutions that create real-world impact.
currentProject: I am currently working on AI/ML engineering specialty certification offered by Google, IBM and Microsoft. It is my goal to become a certified AI/ML engineer and contribute to the development of cutting-edge AI solutions. I am also actively involved in research projects related to information propagation and multi-agent systems, aiming to advance the field of AI and its applications.
description: AI/ML Engineer and Software Developer with a Master's in Information Technology and Systems (Research/Data Science). Experienced in developing machine learning, deep learning, and LLM-based solutions using Python, TensorFlow, and PyTorch, with hands-on experience in Google Cloud and AWS. Strong background in building scalable AI applications, data pipelines, and intelligent systems to solve real-world problems.
